  "claims": [
    "AB 292 will make it easier for No Party Preference voters to request partisan ballots.",
    "AB 292 provides a write-in section for the office of President of the United States on No Party Preference ballots.",
    "Many No Party Preference voters are surprised to find no option to vote for President on Election Day.",
